on-page-seo.title: On-Page SEO
on-page-seo.heroSub: On-page SEO is the foundation everything else is built on. We audit and optimize every signal Google reads — from your title tag to your internal link structure — so each page has the maximum possible chance of ranking.

whatWeDo.title: Title Tag & Meta Description
whatWeDo.desc: Keyword-optimized title tags under 60 chars and compelling meta descriptions that drive click-through from the SERP.

whatWeDo.title: Header Tag Structure (H1–H6)
whatWeDo.desc: Logical heading hierarchy that helps Google understand your content outline and boosts featured snippet eligibility.

whatWeDo.title: Keyword Placement & Density
whatWeDo.desc: Strategic keyword use throughout body copy, intro paragraph, and semantic LSI terms — never over-optimized.

whatWeDo.title: URL Structure
whatWeDo.desc: Clean, short, keyword-rich URLs with proper folder hierarchy and no unnecessary parameters.

whatWeDo.title: Internal Linking
whatWeDo.desc: Strategic internal links that distribute PageRank, improve crawlability, and keep users on-site longer.

whatWeDo.title: Image Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Descriptive alt text, losslessly compressed images, proper file names, and lazy loading for performance.

process.title: Full Page Audit
process.desc: We audit every page on your site for on-page SEO gaps using Screaming Frog and manual review.

process.title: Keyword Mapping
process.desc: Each page gets a primary keyword and 3–5 supporting terms. No two pages compete for the same term.

process.title: Optimization Sprint
process.desc: We directly update or provide change requests for every element — title tags, meta, headers, copy, images, schema.

process.title: Monitor & Adjust
process.desc: Monthly ranking checks per page. We react to algorithm updates and refine underperformers.

faqs.q: What's the difference between on-page and technical SEO?
faqs.a: On-page SEO covers content and HTML elements visible in the page (titles, headings, copy, images). Technical SEO covers server-side factors like crawlability, site speed, and indexing.

faqs.q: How long does on-page SEO take to show results?
faqs.a: Most pages see meaningful ranking movement within 30–60 days of on-page optimization, assuming the domain has some existing authority.

faqs.q: Do you rewrite my content?
faqs.a: We optimize existing content first. If a page needs a full rewrite to rank, we flag it and either rewrite in-house or provide detailed instructions.

faqs.q: How many pages can you optimize per month?
faqs.a: Typically 10–25 pages per month depending on your package. Priority is given to high-traffic and high-intent pages first.

technical-seo.title: Technical SEO
technical-seo.heroSub: If Google can't properly crawl, index, and understand your site — rankings don't happen. We fix every technical flaw standing between your site and search dominance.

whatWeDo.title: Core Web Vitals
whatWeDo.desc: LCP, FID/INP, and CLS optimized to meet Google's page experience thresholds. Lighthouse 90+ target on all pages.

whatWeDo.title: Crawl Budget Management
whatWeDo.desc: Robots.txt, crawl directives, and log file analysis to ensure Google spends its crawl budget on your most important pages.

whatWeDo.title: XML Sitemap & Indexing
whatWeDo.desc: Dynamic XML sitemaps submitted to GSC. Canonical tags, noindex directives, and index bloat removal.

whatWeDo.title: Site Architecture
whatWeDo.desc: Flat URL structure, proper redirect chains (301 cleanup), and silo structure to maximize link equity flow.

whatWeDo.title: Schema Markup
whatWeDo.desc: JSON-LD structured data for LocalBusiness, FAQ, Article, Product, BreadcrumbList, and Review schema.

whatWeDo.title: HTTPS & Security
whatWeDo.desc: SSL validation, mixed content fixes, HSTS headers, and security signal optimization for Google's trust signals.

process.title: Technical Audit
process.desc: Full crawl with Screaming Frog + manual GSC/GA4 analysis. 150-point technical audit report.

process.title: Priority Fix List
process.desc: Issues ranked by impact × effort. Critical fixes actioned first — redirect chains, 404s, canonicals, Core Web Vitals.

process.title: Implementation
process.desc: We implement directly or provide developer-ready tickets. Everything tested in staging before live push.

process.title: Ongoing Monitoring
process.desc: GSC alerts, crawl monitoring, and monthly technical health checks so new issues are caught immediately.

faqs.q: What is Core Web Vitals and why does it matter?
faqs.a: Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID/INP, CLS) measure loading speed, interactivity, and visual stability. Google uses them as a ranking signal. Poor scores hurt your rankings and user experience.

faqs.q: My site was penalized by Google — can you help?
faqs.a: Yes. We diagnose manual actions and algorithmic drops, identify the cause (usually technical issues, thin content, or bad links), and build a recovery plan.

faqs.q: Do I need a developer for technical SEO fixes?
faqs.a: Some fixes require developer access (server config, page speed). We work directly with your dev team or handle implementation ourselves if you give us CMS access.

local-seo.title: Local SEO
local-seo.heroHeadline: Own Your City. Get Found First.
local-seo.heroSub: When local customers search for what you sell, you need to appear in the top 3. We combine Google Business Profile optimization, local citations, reviews, and location-specific content to dominate the local map pack.

whatWeDo.title: Google Business Profile
whatWeDo.desc: Complete GMB audit and optimization — categories, services, photos, Q&A, posts, and weekly activity signals.

whatWeDo.title: Local Keyword Research
whatWeDo.desc: City + service keyword mapping: 'plumber in Dallas', 'best dental clinic Houston' — every local intent captured.

whatWeDo.title: Location Landing Pages
whatWeDo.desc: Unique, content-rich landing pages for every city and neighborhood you serve — not thin duplicate pages.

whatWeDo.title: Citation Building
whatWeDo.desc: NAP submitted consistently to 60+ directories. Existing incorrect citations corrected with an audit-first approach.

whatWeDo.title: Review Strategy
whatWeDo.desc: Automated review generation sequences for Google and industry-specific platforms to build trust and ranking signals.

whatWeDo.title: Local Link Building
whatWeDo.desc: Links from local chambers of commerce, local news sites, community organizations, and niche local directories.

process.title: Local Audit
process.desc: GMB audit, citation consistency check, competitor Map Pack analysis, and keyword gap review.

process.title: Foundation Fix
process.desc: Profile optimized, citations submitted, location pages created or improved.

process.title: Authority Build
process.desc: Review strategy launched, local links acquired, weekly GMB posts begin.

process.title: Dominate & Report
process.desc: Monthly rank tracking for local keywords + Map Pack position. We optimize until you're top 3.

faqs.q: What's the difference between local SEO and regular SEO?
faqs.a: Local SEO focuses on ranking for location-based searches (service + city) and appearing in Google's Map Pack. Regular SEO targets national or global organic rankings.

faqs.q: I have multiple locations — do you handle all of them?
faqs.a: Yes. We manage each location as a separate GBP and create individual location landing pages. Pricing scales per location.

faqs.q: How important are Google reviews for local SEO?
faqs.a: Very important. Review quantity, recency, and rating all directly influence Map Pack rankings. We build a systematic approach to generate reviews ethically.

link-building.title: Link Building
link-building.heroHeadline: Authority Links That Actually Move Rankings.
link-building.heroSub: Not all backlinks are created equal. We build editorial-quality links from DR 50+ domains in your niche — through digital PR, guest posting, and strategic outreach. No PBNs. No spam. Just real authority.

whatWeDo.title: DR 50+ Editorial Links
whatWeDo.desc: We target only relevant, high-authority publications. Every link is manually vetted for niche relevance and traffic.

whatWeDo.title: Guest Posting
whatWeDo.desc: Expertly written guest posts placed on industry publications — real content that earns links and sends referral traffic.

whatWeDo.title: Digital PR
whatWeDo.desc: Linkable assets (studies, infographics, tools) pitched to journalists and bloggers who cover your industry.

whatWeDo.title: HARO Outreach
whatWeDo.desc: We respond to journalist queries on your behalf, earning authoritative media links from publications like Forbes and Entrepreneur.

whatWeDo.title: Broken Link Building
whatWeDo.desc: Find broken links on high-authority sites and offer your content as the replacement — fast, white-hat link acquisition.

whatWeDo.title: Competitor Link Analysis
whatWeDo.desc: We reverse-engineer your top competitors' backlink profiles and systematically replicate their best link sources.

process.title: Backlink Audit
process.desc: Current profile analysis — toxic links disavowed, opportunity gaps identified, competitor analysis completed.

process.title: Target Identification
process.desc: Build a prospect list of 100+ relevant, high-quality link opportunities sorted by DR and relevance.

process.title: Outreach & Placement
process.desc: Personalized outreach at scale. Content written and placed. Links delivered with full reporting.

process.title: Monthly Reporting
process.desc: Every link delivered with DR, URL, anchor text, and traffic data. Full transparency always.

faqs.q: How many links do I get per month?
faqs.a: Typically 4–12 high-quality links per month depending on your package. We prioritize quality over quantity.

faqs.q: Are PBN links safe?
faqs.a: No. Private Blog Networks violate Google's guidelines and risk a manual penalty. We never use them.

faqs.q: What anchor text do you use?
faqs.a: A natural mix: branded, partial match, and generic anchors. We never over-optimize anchor ratios.

ai-seo.title: AI SEO / AIO Optimization
ai-seo.heroSub: Google's AI Overviews now appear in 20%+ of searches, sitting above all organic results. We optimize your content to be selected as the AI source — earning visibility no traditional SEO gets you.

whatWeDo.title: E-E-A-T Signal Building
whatWeDo.desc: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust signals built into your content — author bios, citations, credentials.

whatWeDo.title: FAQ & Concise Answer Blocks
whatWeDo.desc: Structured concise answer blocks that match Google's AI Overview format — direct answers to direct questions.

whatWeDo.title: FAQ Schema Markup
whatWeDo.desc: JSON-LD FAQ schema on every eligible page so Google's AI can extract and display your answers.

whatWeDo.title: Content Depth & Accuracy
whatWeDo.desc: Long-form, factually accurate content with sources cited — the profile Google selects for AI answers.

whatWeDo.title: Query Clustering
whatWeDo.desc: Map every question your audience asks and ensure your content answers it authoritatively in AIO-friendly format.

whatWeDo.title: Featured Snippet Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Position 0 optimization that overlaps with AIO selection — concise definitions, numbered lists, comparison tables.

process.title: AIO Opportunity Audit
process.desc: Identify which keyword clusters trigger AI Overviews and which ones your content is eligible for.

process.title: Content Restructure
process.desc: Restructure existing pages with concise answer blocks, proper headings, and authoritative sourcing.

process.title: Schema & Signals
process.desc: Add FAQ schema, author schema, and E-E-A-T signals throughout your site.

process.title: Monitor & Optimize
process.desc: Track AIO appearances via GSC and manual SERP monitoring. Adjust content format as Google evolves.

faqs.q: What are Google AI Overviews?
faqs.a: AI Overviews (formerly Search Generative Experience) are AI-generated answer blocks that appear at the top of Google results for many queries, above all organic links.

faqs.q: Can I rank in AI Overviews even if I'm not #1?
faqs.a: Yes. Google selects AIO sources based on content quality, E-E-A-T, and format — not just ranking position. You can appear in AIO even from position 5–10.

faqs.q: Does AIO optimization affect regular SEO?
faqs.a: Positively. The content quality that gets selected for AI Overviews also tends to rank better in traditional search.

geo-optimization.title: GEO — Generative Engine Optimization
geo-optimization.heroHeadline: Get Recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini.
geo-optimization.heroSub: Millions of people now ask AI chatbots for business recommendations. If your brand isn't mentioned, you don't exist to them. GEO is the strategy that puts your business in the AI's answer.

whatWeDo.title: Brand Mention Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Build your brand's presence across authoritative sources that AI models train on — Wikipedia, press, .edu, .gov, and high-DR publications.

whatWeDo.title: Structured Knowledge Graph
whatWeDo.desc: Schema markup and structured data that helps AI engines understand exactly who you are, what you do, and where you operate.

whatWeDo.title: Citation & Reference Building
whatWeDo.desc: Get your brand cited in authoritative content that feeds into AI training data — so AI models know and trust your brand.

whatWeDo.title: AI-Friendly Content Creation
whatWeDo.desc: Content written in the format AI models prefer: factual, structured, concise, and authoritative with clear attribution.

whatWeDo.title: Perplexity & ChatGPT Monitoring
whatWeDo.desc: We track how ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude currently describe and recommend your brand — and optimize the gap.

whatWeDo.title: Brand Entity Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Establish your business as a recognized entity across the web — consistent NAP, social profiles, and knowledge panel optimization.

process.title: AI Audit
process.desc: Test 50+ relevant queries across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini — document where your brand appears or doesn't.

process.title: Gap Analysis
process.desc: Identify why competitors are recommended and you aren't. Map the authority signals they have that you lack.

process.title: Authority Build
process.desc: Build the citation profile, structured data, and content assets needed for AI mention inclusion.

process.title: Monitor & Report
process.desc: Monthly AI query testing — tracking brand mentions across all major generative engines.

faqs.q: Is GEO just about ChatGPT?
faqs.a: No. GEO covers all generative AI engines: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, and any future AI search engines.

faqs.q: Can I measure GEO results?
faqs.a: Yes — we test a defined set of queries monthly across each AI engine and track brand mention frequency, position within the answer, and context of recommendation.

faqs.q: How long does GEO take?
faqs.a: First mentions typically appear within 2–4 months of authority building. AI models update their outputs continuously as the web changes.

off-page-seo.title: Off-Page SEO
off-page-seo.heroSub: Rankings are a vote of confidence. Off-page SEO is how you earn that vote — through authoritative backlinks, brand mentions, digital PR, and signals that tell Google your site deserves to rank.

whatWeDo.title: High-DA Backlink Acquisition
whatWeDo.desc: Strategic acquisition of backlinks from DA 40–90+ publications through editorial outreach and content-driven campaigns.

whatWeDo.title: Digital PR Campaigns
whatWeDo.desc: We create newsworthy assets — original research, infographics, industry reports — and pitch them to get featured in major publications.

whatWeDo.title: Brand Mention Monitoring
whatWeDo.desc: Unlinked brand mentions converted into backlinks through outreach — turning existing reputation into ranking power.

whatWeDo.title: Social Signals & Distribution
whatWeDo.desc: Content amplified across social channels to drive shares, engagement, and natural backlink attraction.

whatWeDo.title: Podcast & Media Appearances
whatWeDo.desc: Secure podcast interviews and expert features in industry publications that build E-E-A-T and authority simultaneously.

whatWeDo.title: Competitor Backlink Replication
whatWeDo.desc: Systematic reverse-engineering of competitor link profiles to replicate their highest-value link sources.

process.title: Authority Audit
process.desc: Current Domain Rating, referring domains, anchor text distribution, and toxic link analysis.

process.title: Strategy Design
process.desc: Link acquisition plan matched to your industry — which tactics, which sources, what volume.

process.title: Execution
process.desc: Outreach campaigns run, content created, links secured. Full delivery with proof-of-placement.

process.title: Growth Tracking
process.desc: Monthly DR tracking, referring domain growth, and correlation with ranking improvements.

faqs.q: How is off-page SEO different from link building?
faqs.a: Link building is one component of off-page SEO. Off-page also includes brand mentions, social signals, digital PR, and E-E-A-T signals like author expertise.

faqs.q: Can you remove bad backlinks?
faqs.a: Yes. We identify toxic or low-quality links, attempt manual removal, and use the Google Disavow tool for any that can't be removed.

ecommerce-seo.title: eCommerce SEO
ecommerce-seo.heroHeadline: Turn Organic Traffic into Online Revenue.
ecommerce-seo.heroSub: eCommerce SEO is different. You have thousands of pages, duplicate content at scale, and a customer who's ready to buy. We build the strategy that gets your products found — and purchased.

whatWeDo.title: Product Page Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Unique, keyword-rich product descriptions, optimized title tags, schema markup, and image optimization at scale.

whatWeDo.title: Category Page SEO
whatWeDo.desc: Category pages are your biggest ranking opportunity. We optimize them as standalone content hubs — not just filter pages.

whatWeDo.title: Faceted Navigation Fix
whatWeDo.desc: Filter and facet URLs managed correctly to prevent crawl budget waste and duplicate content penalties.

whatWeDo.title: Product Schema Markup
whatWeDo.desc: Product schema with price, availability, reviews, and ratings — eligible for rich result display in Google Shopping.

whatWeDo.title: Seasonal SEO Strategy
whatWeDo.desc: Content and landing pages planned around peak seasons — Black Friday, holiday shopping, and industry-specific peak periods.

whatWeDo.title: Internal Linking at Scale
whatWeDo.desc: Systematic internal link structure from blog content to products — driving PageRank to your money pages.

process.title: eCommerce Audit
process.desc: Full crawl with Screaming Frog, duplicate content analysis, category structure review, and revenue opportunity mapping.

process.title: Priority Products
process.desc: Identify your top 20% of products by revenue and optimize their pages first for immediate ROI.

process.title: Scale & Structure
process.desc: Category pages, faceted nav fix, internal linking, and product schema implemented across the catalog.

process.title: Content & Links
process.desc: Blog strategy targeting commercial intent queries. Link building to category and product pages.

faqs.q: We have 10,000+ products — can you handle that scale?
faqs.a: Yes. We use templates, programmatic optimization, and automation to optimize large catalogs efficiently.

faqs.q: Should we optimize product pages or category pages first?
faqs.a: Category pages first — they have the most ranking power and internal link equity. Product pages benefit from category page authority.

wordpress.title: WordPress Web Design
wordpress.heroHeadline: WordPress Done Right. Fast, Beautiful, and Built to Rank.
wordpress.heroSub: Not all WordPress sites are created equal. Ours are custom-built with zero bloat — fast, mobile-first, conversion-optimized, and SEO-ready from day one. No Elementor nightmares. No performance drag.

whatWeDo.title: Custom WordPress Theme
whatWeDo.desc: 100% custom theme development — no premium themes, no page builders. Clean, fast, fully branded.

whatWeDo.title: SEO-Ready Architecture
whatWeDo.desc: Proper heading structure, schema markup, XML sitemap, canonical tags, and robots.txt configured from day one.

whatWeDo.title: WooCommerce Integration
whatWeDo.desc: Full e-commerce capability with product pages, cart, secure checkout, and payment gateway integration.

whatWeDo.title: Plugin Audit & Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: We audit your plugin stack, remove bloat, and keep only what's needed — resulting in faster load times.

whatWeDo.title: Page Speed Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Caching, CDN setup, image optimization, code minification. Every site targets under 2 seconds load time.

whatWeDo.title: CMS Training
whatWeDo.desc: We train you and your team to manage content, add pages, and update products without needing a developer.

process.title: Wireframe & Design
process.desc: Full Figma mockups for desktop and mobile, approved before any code is written.

process.title: WordPress Setup
process.desc: Hosting configured, WordPress installed, custom theme development begins in staging environment.

process.title: Build & Test
process.desc: Theme built, content added, all functionality tested across browsers and devices.

process.title: Launch & Train
process.desc: DNS transfer, SSL, GA4/GSC setup, CMS training, and a 30-day post-launch support window.

faqs.q: Do you use Elementor or Divi?
faqs.a: No. We avoid page builders for performance sites. We develop custom themes using PHP, HTML, CSS, and Alpine.js or Vanilla JS for interactivity.

faqs.q: Can you fix or redesign my existing WordPress site?
faqs.a: Yes. We can audit your existing site, fix performance issues, or rebuild it completely in a staging environment while your live site stays online.

faqs.q: Will I be able to add new content myself?
faqs.a: Absolutely. WordPress is designed for non-technical content management. We set up custom post types and fields that make updates easy.

ecommerce.title: eCommerce Web Design
ecommerce.heroHeadline: An Online Store That Actually Sells.
ecommerce.heroSub: Beautiful products deserve a store that converts visitors into buyers. We design and build high-performance eCommerce websites — WooCommerce, Shopify, or custom — optimized for the checkout experience that makes customers complete their purchase.

whatWeDo.title: Conversion-First Design
whatWeDo.desc: Every layout decision made with conversion in mind — product imagery, social proof placement, CTA positioning, and checkout flow reduction.

whatWeDo.title: Mobile-First Shopping
whatWeDo.desc: 60%+ of shopping is mobile. Our stores are designed mobile-first — thumb-friendly product grids, fast checkout, Apple Pay / Google Pay.

whatWeDo.title: Product Page Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: High-converting product pages with zoom-capable images, size guides, review display, trust badges, and scarcity triggers.

whatWeDo.title: Secure Checkout Integration
whatWeDo.desc: Stripe, PayPal, Klarna, Afterpay integrations. PCI-compliant checkout. Abandoned cart recovery emails configured.

whatWeDo.title: Inventory Management
whatWeDo.desc: Full inventory systems — stock management, variants, categories, bulk import tools, and low-stock notifications.

whatWeDo.title: Analytics & Conversion Tracking
whatWeDo.desc: GA4 eCommerce tracking, Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversion tags, and a revenue dashboard from day one.

process.title: Store Strategy
process.desc: Product catalog audit, checkout flow planning, platform selection (WooCommerce vs Shopify), and competitor UX audit.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Full store design in Figma — homepage, category, product, cart, and checkout pages.

process.title: Build & Integrate
process.desc: Development, payment gateway integration, email sequences (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase), and product import.

process.title: Launch & Optimize
process.desc: Go live, analytics verified, first A/B tests configured, and 30-day support included.

faqs.q: WooCommerce or Shopify — which is better?
faqs.a: WooCommerce gives more flexibility and is better for SEO customization. Shopify is faster to launch and easier to manage. We recommend WooCommerce for businesses needing custom functionality and Shopify for simplicity.

faqs.q: Can you migrate our existing store?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle full migrations — products, customers, orders, SEO URLs, and reviews — with zero downtime.

shopify.title: Shopify Development
shopify.heroSub: We build custom Shopify stores that go far beyond stock themes — unique designs, custom functionality, and optimization strategies that turn Shopify's powerful platform into your highest-performing sales channel.

whatWeDo.title: Custom Shopify Theme Dev
whatWeDo.desc: Hand-coded Liquid themes built to your brand — no stock templates, no Dawn modifications. Genuinely unique.

whatWeDo.title: Shopify App Integration
whatWeDo.desc: Strategic app selection to add only needed functionality — reviews (Judge.me), subscriptions (ReCharge), upsells (CartHook), email (Klaviyo).

whatWeDo.title: Shopify Speed Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Shopify stores often load slowly due to apps. We audit, minimize, and optimize for sub-2-second load times.

whatWeDo.title: Shopify SEO
whatWeDo.desc: Canonical tags, meta optimization, collection structure, blog setup, and sitemap — Shopify SEO done properly.

whatWeDo.title: International & Multi-Currency
whatWeDo.desc: Shopify Markets setup for international sales — multi-currency, local payment methods, and translated storefronts.

whatWeDo.title: Shopify Plus Migration
whatWeDo.desc: Migrate from standard Shopify to Plus with custom checkout scripting, B2B functionality, and automation flows.

process.title: Store Audit
process.desc: If migrating: current performance, theme, apps, and revenue analysis. If new: business requirements and competitor audit.

process.title: Custom Design
process.desc: Figma mockups for every key template: home, collection, product, cart, and checkout.

process.title: Build & Configure
process.desc: Liquid theme developed, apps installed and configured, products imported, payment and shipping configured.

process.title: Launch & Grow
process.desc: Store goes live. Marketing pixels, Klaviyo flows, and analytics verified on launch day.

faqs.q: Can you work with our existing Shopify store?
faqs.a: Yes — redesign, speed optimization, new functionality, or app management. We work on existing stores without disrupting your operations.

faqs.q: Is Shopify good for SEO?
faqs.a: It's decent out of the box but has limitations (canonical URL issues, URL structure). We fix all Shopify SEO issues and maximize its ranking potential.

woocommerce.title: WooCommerce Development
woocommerce.heroSub: WooCommerce built right is the most powerful eCommerce platform on the web. We design, build, and optimize WooCommerce stores that load fast, rank well, and convert at industry-leading rates.

whatWeDo.title: Custom WooCommerce Theme
whatWeDo.desc: Pixel-perfect custom themes that leave Storefront and premade options behind — built for your brand and products.

whatWeDo.title: Performance Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: WooCommerce can be slow. We optimize database queries, implement caching, and configure CDN to keep load times under 2 seconds.

whatWeDo.title: Payment & Shipping Config
whatWeDo.desc: Stripe, PayPal, and local payment gateways. Real-time shipping rates with USPS, UPS, FedEx, and DHL integration.

whatWeDo.title: Product Variations & Bundles
whatWeDo.desc: Complex variable products, product bundles, subscriptions, and digital downloads all configured correctly.

whatWeDo.title: B2B Functionality
whatWeDo.desc: Wholesale pricing tiers, user roles, minimum order quantities, and quote forms for B2B WooCommerce stores.

whatWeDo.title: SEO & Analytics
whatWeDo.desc: Full WooCommerce eCommerce tracking in GA4, Google Ads conversion tracking, and SEO optimization of all product and category pages.

process.title: Requirements
process.desc: Define product catalog, variations, shipping zones, payment needs, and integrations required.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Custom mockups for all key pages — verified before development.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Custom theme, WooCommerce configuration, plugin setup, and content population.

process.title: Launch
process.desc: Testing across all checkout flows, payment processing verified, and go-live support included.

faqs.q: Is WooCommerce or Shopify better?
faqs.a: WooCommerce offers more flexibility, better SEO control, and no transaction fees. Shopify is easier to manage. For businesses that want control and scalability, WooCommerce wins.

faqs.q: Can you add subscriptions to our WooCommerce store?
faqs.a: Yes — using WooCommerce Subscriptions. We set up subscription products, billing cycles, proration, and cancellation flows.

b2b-web-design.title: B2B Web Design
b2b-web-design.heroHeadline: A Website That Closes Enterprise Deals.
b2b-web-design.heroSub: B2B buyers spend on average 27% of their research time on your website before ever speaking to sales. Your site has to build instant credibility and capture leads from the first visit.

whatWeDo.title: Trust & Authority Design
whatWeDo.desc: Social proof architecture — client logos, case studies, certifications, and team credentials placed strategically.

whatWeDo.title: Lead Generation Funnels
whatWeDo.desc: Gated content downloads, demo request forms, contact funnels, and live chat — all with CRM integration.

whatWeDo.title: Service & Solution Pages
whatWeDo.desc: Industry-specific solution pages targeting the exact verticals you serve — resonating with each buyer persona.

whatWeDo.title: Case Study Templates
whatWeDo.desc: Professionally designed case study pages with results visualization — your strongest sales tool online.

whatWeDo.title: LinkedIn Pixel & ABM Ready
whatWeDo.desc: LinkedIn Insight Tag, retargeting audiences, and Account-Based Marketing infrastructure built in.

whatWeDo.title: SEO for B2B Keywords
whatWeDo.desc: Targeting industry-specific intent: 'enterprise software vendor', 'B2B fulfillment partner', 'wholesale supplier Dallas'.

process.title: ICP & Persona Mapping
process.desc: Define ideal customer profile, buying committee roles, and the content each persona needs at each stage.

process.title: Architecture & Design
process.desc: Sitemap designed around the buyer journey. Mockups created for all key pages.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Custom build with CMS, CRM integration, and tracking stack configured.

process.title: Launch & ABM Setup
process.desc: LinkedIn Insight Tag, GA4, HubSpot/Salesforce integration, and content marketing strategy.

faqs.q: What CRM do you integrate with?
faqs.a: HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, and GoHighLevel. We build bidirectional integrations so form submissions go directly into your pipeline.

faqs.q: Do you write the content too?
faqs.a: Yes — we have B2B copywriters who understand technical industries and can write solution pages, case studies, and thought leadership content.

landing-pages.title: Landing Page Design
landing-pages.heroSub: The average landing page converts at 2.4%. Ours average 8–12%. Every element — headline, hero image, social proof placement, CTA — is engineered with one goal: turn ad clicks into leads.

whatWeDo.title: Conversion Copy
whatWeDo.desc: Headlines, subheadlines, body copy, and CTAs written using proven persuasion frameworks — AIDA, PAS, and social proof structure.

whatWeDo.title: Hero Section Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Above-the-fold designed to communicate value in 5 seconds — headline, subheadline, hero image, and primary CTA.

whatWeDo.title: Social Proof Integration
whatWeDo.desc: Reviews, trust badges, client logos, media mentions, and case study numbers placed at highest-impact positions.

whatWeDo.title: Form Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Short-form vs long-form tested. Field reduction where possible. Two-step form optin for higher completion rates.

whatWeDo.title: A/B Testing Framework
whatWeDo.desc: Multiple headline, CTA, image, and layout variants built and tested via Google Optimize or VWO.

whatWeDo.title: Tracking Stack
whatWeDo.desc: Google Ads, Meta Pixel, GA4, and CRM form integration configured so every lead is tracked to the campaign.

process.title: Brief & Offer Audit
process.desc: Review your ad creative, offer, audience, and current conversion data or benchmarks.

process.title: Copy & Design
process.desc: Conversion copy written first, then design mockup created around the copy structure.

process.title: Build & Track
process.desc: Page built, tracking verified end-to-end, and A/B test variants configured.

process.title: Test & Optimize
process.desc: Traffic sent, data collected, winner identified, and optimization continues.

faqs.q: How long does it take to build a landing page?
faqs.a: Typically 5–7 business days for design + development. Rush delivery in 2–3 days is available for active campaigns.

faqs.q: Do I need a new landing page for each ad campaign?
faqs.a: Ideally yes — message matching between ad and landing page significantly increases conversion rates. We can build multiple variants efficiently.

google-ads.title: Google Ads Management
google-ads.heroHeadline: Google Ads That Generate Profit, Not Just Clicks.
google-ads.heroSub: Most Google Ads accounts waste 60%+ of their budget on broad match terms, poor quality scores, and bad account structure. We fix that — and build campaigns that deliver a measurable return on every dollar.

whatWeDo.title: Search Campaign Strategy
whatWeDo.desc: Exact and phrase match campaigns targeting high-intent commercial keywords. Zero broad match waste.

whatWeDo.title: Quality Score Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: We improve Quality Scores by aligning keywords, ad copy, and landing pages — reducing your cost per click by 20–50%.

whatWeDo.title: Conversion Tracking Setup
whatWeDo.desc: Phone calls, form fills, purchases, and chat events tracked accurately via Google Tag Manager — no missing conversions.

whatWeDo.title: Negative Keyword Management
whatWeDo.desc: Weekly negative keyword additions to prevent spend waste on irrelevant searches — often saves 20–30% of budget.

whatWeDo.title: Ad Copy Testing
whatWeDo.desc: Responsive Search Ads with 5+ headlines and 4+ descriptions tested continuously. Only top performers serve.

whatWeDo.title: Bid Strategy Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Smart bidding calibrated to your actual conversion data — Target CPA or Target ROAS bidding with warm campaigns.

process.title: Account Audit
process.desc: If you have existing campaigns: full waste analysis, Quality Score audit, conversion tracking verification, and structure review.

process.title: Strategy & Restructure
process.desc: Campaign rebuilt with correct structure: tightly themed ad groups, match type strategy, and negative keyword lists.

process.title: Launch & Stabilize
process.desc: Campaigns go live. Daily monitoring for first 2 weeks. Budget pacing, Quality Score, and CPA tracked.

process.title: Optimize & Scale
process.desc: Monthly bid adjustments, negative keyword adds, ad copy rotation, and budget reallocation to top performers.

faqs.q: How much should I budget for Google Ads?
faqs.a: We recommend minimum $1,000–$1,500/month in ad spend for local businesses. Competitive industries need $3,000–$10,000+/month for meaningful volume.

faqs.q: My previous Google Ads didn't work — what was wrong?
faqs.a: Usually: broad match keywords wasting budget, poor Quality Scores, no negative keywords, or sending traffic to a homepage instead of a dedicated landing page.

faqs.q: How long until I see results?
faqs.a: Leads from day one. It takes 60–90 days of optimization data to reach peak ROAS performance.

google-shopping.title: Google Shopping Ads
google-shopping.heroHeadline: Get Your Products in Front of Ready-to-Buy Shoppers.
google-shopping.heroSub: Google Shopping Ads appear above all search results with product image, price, and brand — capturing buyers at the exact moment they're searching to purchase. We manage your Merchant Center and Shopping campaigns for maximum ROAS.

whatWeDo.title: Google Merchant Center Setup
whatWeDo.desc: Full GMC account setup, product feed creation, feed health monitoring, and disapproval resolution.

whatWeDo.title: Product Feed Optimization
whatWeDo.desc: Optimized product titles, descriptions, GTINs, custom labels, and attributes that improve auction eligibility and impressions.

whatWeDo.title: Standard vs Performance Max
whatWeDo.desc: We select the right campaign type per product category and audience maturity — not blindly using Performance Max.

whatWeDo.title: ROAS Bidding
whatWeDo.desc: Target ROAS bidding configured with accurate conversion values — calibrated to your actual margins per product.

whatWeDo.title: Competitive Price Intelligence
whatWeDo.desc: Monitor competitor pricing in your product categories — alerts when you're losing impression share due to price.

whatWeDo.title: Seasonal Bid Adjustments
whatWeDo.desc: Budget and bid increases pre-planned for peak seasons — Black Friday, Christmas, Valentine's Day — to capture surge demand.

process.title: Feed Audit
process.desc: Review current feed health, disapprovals, competitive impression share, and ROAS baseline.

process.title: Feed Optimization
process.desc: Product titles rewritten, attributes completed, custom labels configured for bid segmentation.

process.title: Campaign Build
process.desc: Shopping campaigns structured by product category with ROAS targets set per category margin.

process.title: Scale
process.desc: Weekly performance review. Budget shifted to highest ROAS categories. Underperforming SKUs excluded.

faqs.q: What is Google Merchant Center?
faqs.a: Google Merchant Center is where your product catalog lives. Google pulls product data from here to show Shopping Ads. Feed quality directly determines Shopping Ad performance.

faqs.q: Should we use Performance Max or Standard Shopping?
faqs.a: It depends on your data maturity. Standard Shopping gives more control. Performance Max uses AI — it works well with a lot of conversion data. We assess this for your catalog.

meta-ads.title: Facebook & Meta Ads
meta-ads.heroHeadline: Meta Ads That Fill Your Pipeline — Not Just Your Reach.
meta-ads.heroSub: Facebook and Instagram advertising is still the most powerful targeting platform on earth — when used correctly. We build data-driven Meta campaigns that generate qualified leads and eCommerce revenue at scale.

whatWeDo.title: Audience Architecture
whatWeDo.desc: Custom audiences (website visitors, email list, video viewers), lookalike audiences, and interest-based cold audiences structured in a full-funnel approach.

whatWeDo.title: Creative Testing Framework
whatWeDo.desc: Multiple ad formats tested — static images, video, carousels, collections — with systematic creative iteration every 2 weeks.

whatWeDo.title: Meta Pixel & Events API
whatWeDo.desc: Full pixel setup with Conversions API (server-side) to maintain tracking accuracy after iOS 14+ changes.

whatWeDo.title: Full-Funnel Structure
whatWeDo.desc: Awareness, consideration, and conversion campaigns — moving prospects through the funnel with retargeting at each stage.

whatWeDo.title: Lead Generation Ads
whatWeDo.desc: Instant lead forms or click-to-website campaigns — optimized for cost per lead with real-time CRM sync.

whatWeDo.title: eCommerce Catalog Ads
whatWeDo.desc: Dynamic product ads showing the exact products a user viewed on your site — highest ROAS for eCommerce.

process.title: Pixel & Audience Audit
process.desc: Verify pixel events, existing audiences, and campaign structure. Identify what's working and what's wasting budget.

process.title: Strategy & Creative Brief
process.desc: Define full-funnel strategy, ad formats, copy angles, and creative direction before any spend.

process.title: Launch & Test
process.desc: Campaigns launched with A/B testing across audiences and creatives. Daily monitoring week one.

process.title: Scale Winners
process.desc: Winning audiences and creatives scaled. New creative refresh every 2 weeks to combat ad fatigue.

faqs.q: Does Facebook Ads still work after iOS 14?
faqs.a: Yes — but tracking requires Conversions API (server-side) implementation and 7-day attribution windows. We set this up correctly from day one.

faqs.q: What industries work best on Meta Ads?
faqs.a: Almost all B2C industries: real estate, beauty, fitness, restaurants, retail, education, events, and local services. B2B works on LinkedIn better.

ecommerce-ppc.title: eCommerce PPC Management
ecommerce-ppc.heroHeadline: Scale Your Online Store with Profitable Paid Ads.
ecommerce-ppc.heroSub: eCommerce PPC is a full-channel game — Google Shopping, Search, Meta Dynamic Ads, YouTube, and retargeting all working together. We manage the complete paid advertising ecosystem for your store with one obsessive focus: ROAS.

whatWeDo.title: Full-Channel Strategy
whatWeDo.desc: Google Shopping + Search + Meta Dynamic + YouTube Ads all managed under one strategy with unified attribution.

whatWeDo.title: Product-Level ROAS Bidding
whatWeDo.desc: Bid optimization per product SKU based on margin — highest bid on most profitable products, suppressed on low-margin items.

whatWeDo.title: Dynamic Remarketing
whatWeDo.desc: Show exact products each visitor viewed but didn't buy — the highest ROAS campaign type in eCommerce.

whatWeDo.title: Funnel-Based Budgeting
whatWeDo.desc: Budget allocated across awareness (YouTube), consideration (Meta), and conversion (Shopping/Search) based on customer LTV.

whatWeDo.title: Revenue Attribution
whatWeDo.desc: Multi-touch attribution showing which channels actually drove the sale — not just last-click.

whatWeDo.title: Seasonal Campaign Planning
whatWeDo.desc: Black Friday, holiday, and peak season campaigns planned 6 weeks ahead with pre-built audiences and creative.

process.title: Store & Data Audit
process.desc: Revenue per channel, ROAS by product category, conversion funnel drop-off, and tracking accuracy audit.

process.title: Channel Strategy
process.desc: Define budget allocation across channels, product segmentation strategy, and audience architecture.

process.title: Build & Launch
process.desc: All campaigns built, tracking verified, and launched with close monitoring.

process.title: Optimize & Scale
process.desc: Weekly optimization across all channels. Scale budget into highest ROAS campaigns and products.

faqs.q: What ROAS should we target?
faqs.a: Target ROAS depends on your margins. For a 50% margin, 2x ROAS is breakeven. We typically target 3–6x depending on margin and business model.

faqs.q: How do we know which channel is driving sales?
faqs.a: We set up multi-touch attribution — giving credit to every touchpoint that contributed to the sale, not just the last ad clicked.

lead-gen-ppc.title: Lead Gen PPC
lead-gen-ppc.heroHeadline: Pay Per Click. Get Paid Per Lead.
lead-gen-ppc.heroSub: Lead generation PPC requires a completely different approach from eCommerce. We build campaigns that attract high-intent prospects, qualify them before click, and deliver them to high-converting landing pages — at the lowest possible cost per lead.

whatWeDo.title: High-Intent Keyword Targeting
whatWeDo.desc: Commercial and transactional keywords only — 'hire', 'near me', 'cost', 'best', 'affordable'. Zero informational waste.

whatWeDo.title: Lead Qualification in Ad Copy
whatWeDo.desc: Price signals, location specifics, and qualification criteria in ad headlines — so only serious prospects click.

whatWeDo.title: Call Extension Campaigns
whatWeDo.desc: Click-to-call ads for service businesses — phone leads often convert at 30%+ vs 5% for form fills.

whatWeDo.title: Landing Page Integration
whatWeDo.desc: Dedicated landing pages per service and location, matched exactly to ad copy for maximum Quality Score and conversion.

whatWeDo.title: CRM Lead Routing
whatWeDo.desc: Every lead instant-routed to your CRM with campaign, keyword, and ad source data for full attribution.

whatWeDo.title: Lead Scoring & Feedback Loop
whatWeDo.desc: We track which leads become customers and optimize campaigns for lead quality — not just lead volume.

process.title: ICP Definition
process.desc: Define your ideal customer profile, budget threshold, and lead quality criteria.

process.title: Keyword & Copy Strategy
process.desc: High-intent keyword research, ad copy written with built-in qualification, and landing page brief.

process.title: Launch
process.desc: Campaigns live with conversion tracking end-to-end — from click to CRM entry.

process.title: CPL Optimization
process.desc: Continuous reduction in cost per qualified lead via bid optimization, negative keywords, and landing page testing.

faqs.q: How do you measure lead quality, not just quantity?
faqs.a: We integrate with your CRM or sales team to track which leads convert to customers. We then feed this data back into Google Ads to optimize for quality leads.

faqs.q: Should we use Google Ads or Meta Ads for lead gen?
faqs.a: Google for in-market demand (people actively searching). Meta for interest-based targeting and creating demand. Ideally both, with different messaging.

youtube-ads.title: YouTube Ads Management
youtube-ads.heroHeadline: Video Ads That Build Brands and Drive Revenue.
youtube-ads.heroSub: YouTube reaches 2.7 billion users monthly. Your competitors aren't using it — which means your cost per impression is cheaper, your audience less fatigued, and your brand can own entire categories at a fraction of the cost.

whatWeDo.title: In-Stream Ad Campaigns
whatWeDo.desc: Skippable and non-skippable in-stream ads targeting your ideal audience — you only pay when someone watches 30+ seconds.

whatWeDo.title: Video Creative Consulting
whatWeDo.desc: We advise on or script the first 5 seconds (the hook) — the only part that matters before viewers skip.

whatWeDo.title: Custom Intent Audiences
whatWeDo.desc: Target people who recently searched specific keywords on Google — combining Google's search intent with YouTube's reach.

whatWeDo.title: YouTube Remarketing
whatWeDo.desc: Re-engage your website visitors and existing YouTube channel viewers with tailored video sequences.

whatWeDo.title: Awareness to Conversion Funnels
whatWeDo.desc: Multi-video funnel: brand awareness video → product demo → testimonial → offer — moving cold audiences to buyers.

whatWeDo.title: View-Through Attribution
whatWeDo.desc: Track how YouTube video views influence later conversions on search and shopping — full contribution visibility.

process.title: Audience & Creative Brief
process.desc: Define target audience, campaign goal (awareness vs conversion), and video creative requirements.

process.title: Campaign Build
process.desc: YouTube campaigns structured by audience temperature with view-through tracking configured.

process.title: Launch & Monitor
process.desc: Video ads go live. First-5-second hook tracked for view rate. Audience targeting refined.

process.title: Scale & Sequence
process.desc: High-performing videos scaled. Sequential ad delivery configured to move viewers through the funnel.

faqs.q: Do I need a professional video for YouTube Ads?
faqs.a: Not necessarily. Well-lit, direct-to-camera videos filmed on a modern phone often outperform expensive produced ads because they feel authentic.

faqs.q: How much does YouTube advertising cost?
faqs.a: CPVs (cost per view) typically range $0.05–$0.15, making YouTube one of the cheapest awareness channels available. Minimum recommended budget is $1,000/month.
